description_long: This is a modern, upholstered lounge chair featuring a smooth, continuous shell design with integrated armrests and a gently curved backrest. The seat and back are covered in a light beige fabric, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. The chair is supported by four slightly tapered wooden legs, finished in a warm reddish-brown tone, which contrast elegantly with the upholstery. The armrests and backrest form a single, seamless curve, providing both comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The seat is wide and deep, suitable for relaxed seating in public or semi-public urban environments. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible seams or decorative patterns, emphasizing clean lines and comfort.
description: A modern lounge chair with light beige fabric upholstery, curved integrated armrests and backrest, and four tapered wooden legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban indoor settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the continuous curve of the armrest and backrest, with two wooden legs visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, inviting seat and the seamless integration of the armrests and backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest curve and showing the other two wooden legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full curvature of the backrest and the symmetrical placement of the legs.
